title: TFC Animals Addition
description: Heads and carpets of wild animals.
body:
TFC Animals Addition

![Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7240995ba9ccb670f352a8af452395ac26a3a49d_0.webp)

 ![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Release-success?style=flat-square)
![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-red?style=flat-square)
![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/Languages-EN%20%7C%20RU-blue?style=flat-square)

### 🐾 TFC Wild Trophies
TFC Wild Trophies is an add-on for TerraFirmaCraft that introduces animal head mounts and hide carpets crafted from wildlife across the world. Bring atmosphere, storytelling, and natural decoration to your TFC builds with trophies earned through real survival challenges.
## ✨ Features
🦌 Mounted animal heads from various wild creatures


🐾 Hide carpets & rugs with species-specific patterns


🔧 Fully integrated with TFC butchering & hunting


🌍 Fits naturally into TFC progression and balance


🏡 Perfect for lodges, cabins, tribe villages, medieval halls, or decorative bases
### 🎯 Gameplay
Hunt wild animals, collect their hides or skulls, and craft unique decorations that showcase your survival achievements. Every trophy tells a story — your story — of exploration and wilderness danger.


📦 Compatibility


✔ Requires TerraFirmaCraft


✔ Requires TFC Textile


✔ Works with modpacks
